# SimpleWebApp .NET 8 Modernization Progress

## Overview

Modernizing SimpleWebApp (already on net8.0) by migrating from the legacy Startup.cs hosting model to the minimal hosting model, enabling nullable reference types and implicit usings, and converting all source files to file-scoped namespaces.

**Progress**: 4/4 tasks complete <progress value="100" max="100"></progress> 100%

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-hosting-migration: Migrate to minimal hosting model ([Content](tasks/01-hosting-migration/task.md), [Progress](tasks/01-hosting-migration/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 02-project-modernization: Enable nullable reference types and implicit usings ([Content](tasks/02-project-modernization/task.md), [Progress](tasks/02-project-modernization/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 03-code-patterns: Apply file-scoped namespaces ([Content](tasks/03-code-patterns/task.md), [Progress](tasks/03-code-patterns/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 04-final-validation: Build and verify ([Content](tasks/04-final-validation/task.md), [Progress](tasks/04-final-validation/progress-details.md))
